allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.ftcscout.org/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"query\\":\\"{__schema{queryType{fields{name args{name type{name kind ofType{name kind ofType{name}}}}}}}}\\"}")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'], [a['name'] for a in f.get\('args',[]\)]\) for f in d['data']['__type']['fields']]")
